name: Watchdata
description: Read Ethereum balances, blocks, and transactions through WatchData's hosted JSON-RPC API.

auth.hint: Create a WatchData application API key and send it in the x-api-key header.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Retrieve an Ethereum account balance at a selected block state.

params.name: method
params.description: JSON-RPC method; set this to eth_getBalance.

params.name: params
params.description: Positional array containing the 20-byte account address and a block quantity or latest, earliest, or pending tag.

tools.name: get_block
tools.description: Retrieve an Ethereum block by number or block-state tag.

params.name: method
params.description: JSON-RPC method; set this to eth_getBlockByNumber.

params.name: params
params.description: Positional array containing a hexadecimal block number or earliest, latest, or pending tag, followed by a boolean selecting full transaction objects.

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Retrieve an Ethereum transaction by its transaction hash.

params.name: method
params.description: JSON-RPC method; set this to eth_getTransactionByHash.

params.name: params
params.description: Positional array containing one 32-byte transaction hash.
